steps.name: export-contract-and-dependencies
steps.summary: Confirmed export/capture contract in docs/ui-vocabulary/export-capture.md. PDF modes are current/all/poster; PNG scope is single term card/detail. Added html-to-image as the browser-only DOM capture dependency. npm run build and npm run lint passed; lint only reports existing shadcn Fast Refresh warnings.

steps.name: print-and-pdf-layout-hardening
steps.summary: Split PDF export into current and all modes with temporary state restore after print. Added print-only export summary, data-export-root/data-print-mode contract, and A4 summary styling. Verified npm run build, npm run lint, and Playwright smoke: current captured 35 / 257 terms for input category, all captured 257 / 257 terms, and the screen restored to the input filter after print.
